# UI Handoff — sales-workbench

## Required Figma Selection

Use node `122924:5188`.

## Text Requirements

All metric titles must remain editable text.

## State Coverage

Default, empty and loading states are required.

## Asset Marking

| Asset ID | Marking | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| icon-filter | exportable | SVG icon for toolbar |
| chart-empty | source unclear | Needs product/design confirmation |

## Known Gaps

- [ ] `chart-empty` source and ownership need confirmation.

## Non-Goals

This document is not an implementation spec and does not authorize coding.
